title: hierochloe odorata subsp. glabra
intro: Hierochloe odorata subsp. glabra, commonly known as sweet grass or vanilla grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its sweet, vanilla-like fragrance, which is released when its leaves are bruised or crushed. The medicinal properties of Hierochloe odorata subsp. glabra include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting digestive health, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils.
